commands.review_summary:
The branch adds caller-owned realpath and existing-ancestor caches to plugin hook/skill resolution and sandbox host-path validation, with stale symlink and junction regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +75, Tests +127. Total +202 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows findMountByHostPath now requires hostPathCache while the relative sandbox cwd lookup still calls it with only mounts and target; a type gate should reproduce the failure.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair is clear: propagate the existing per-operation cache through the missed sandbox cwd lookup; maintainer/security acceptance remains after that repair.
